overview.short: Gagangad is a fort situated in Gaganbawada tehsil of Kolhapur district in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Gagangad is a fort situated in Gaganbawada tehsil of Kolhapur district in Maharashtra, India. It was built in 1190. This fort is situated 55 km west of Kolhapur city. There is below Fort Mahadev temple and Gagangiri Maharaj math.

topPlaces.name: Gaganbawada
topPlaces.description: Gaganbawada is a town situated in the district of Kolhapur in Maharashtra, India. It is located 55 km by road from Kankavli.

items.note: Gaganbawada is a town situated in the district of Kolhapur in Maharashtra, India. It is located 55 km by road from Kankavli.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gagangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gagangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (127 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gagangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gagangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gagangad?
faq.a: Stays in Gagangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
